clinic_name: Allo Health, Ameerpet - Sexual Health Clinic
review_text: I am writing this review after completing almost 4 months of treatment with Allo Health Clinic for my sexual health concerns. During this entire period, I spent nearly ₹10,000 on consultations, medicines, and follow-ups, hoping for proper guidance and real improvement in my condition. Unfortunately, after investing so much time, money, trust, and emotional energy, I received absolutely zero results.  What disappointed me the most is that even after multiple consultations, it felt like the actual root cause of my problem was never properly identified. I honestly do not know whether the issue was with the treatment approach, lack of proper diagnosis, or the doctor’s handling of the case, but as a patient, I expected professionalism, clarity, and genuine care. Instead, I was left confused, mentally stressed, and frustrated.  The most hurtful experience happened during a follow-up call from the clinic. A receptionist called me regarding my consultation experience. I explained everything in detail very respectfully — how I had followed the treatment sincerely for months, spent a significant amount of money, and still saw no improvement at all. Rather than listening with empathy or trying to resolve the issue properly, it felt like she was only trying to defend the clinic and cover up the situation.  After hearing my concerns, she simply said that she would change the doctor and asked me to stay on hold for a minute. Then suddenly, the call was disconnected, and nobody bothered to call back afterward. That behavior genuinely hurt me. As a patient already struggling physically and mentally, such treatment feels extremely disrespectful and insensitive.  Patients visit clinics like this with hope, trust, and personal vulnerability. Sexual health issues are already difficult to discuss openly, and when someone spends months under treatment with no improvement and then gets treated carelessly by the staff, it becomes emotionally exhausting.  I am leaving this 1-star review because my overall experience was deeply disappointing. I hope the clinic improves its patient care, communication, diagnostic process, and accountability so that others do not go through the same frustration I experienced.

Our records indicate that you arrived at approximately 5:40 PM. At that time, two patients with prior scheduled slots were already waiting, and the doctor was concluding an extended consultation with another patient who required additional time regarding medication concerns.  We understand that waiting can be frustrating. However, we make every effort to follow appointment order fairly and ensure that each patient receives adequate attention - especially in cases where medical discussions require more time than initially allotted.  Regarding your concern about the doctor using a laptop during the consultation - this is part of our standard process for reviewing medical history and documenting notes accurately to ensure appropriate treatment. It is not intended to suggest inattention.  As per our records, the prescribed medications were not purchased from Allo, If you have purchased any medicines from outside and are experiencing side effects, we request you to kindly reconsult the doctor at the earliest. We always advise our patients to report any discomfort immediately so that necessary adjustments can be made to the treatment plan.  We would have been happy to guide you further had we been informed earlier.
